name: auditSummaryV2
description: Resumo completo com contagem de todas as tabelas
code:
SELECT
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TICKETS) AS TOTAL_TICKETS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACOES) AS TOTAL_ACOES,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APONTAMENTOS) AS TOTAL_APONTAMENTOS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TICKET_CLIENTES) AS TOTAL_CLIENTES_TICKET,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLIENTES) AS TOTAL_CLIENTES,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ANALISTAS) AS TOTAL_ANALISTAS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PESQUISAS) AS TOTAL_PESQUISAS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STATUS_HISTORICO) AS TOTAL_STATUS_HIST,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OWNER_HISTORICO) AS TOTAL_OWNER_HIST,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOM_FIELD_VALUES) AS TOTAL_CUSTOM_FIELDS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TICKET_TAGS) AS TOTAL_TAGS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TICKET_ASSETS) AS TOTAL_ASSETS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACOES_ANEXOS) AS TOTAL_ANEXOS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ACOES_DESPESAS) AS TOTAL_DESPESAS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TICKET_PARENT) AS TOTAL_PARENTS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TICKET_CHILDREN) AS TOTAL_CHILDREN,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYNC_LOG) AS TOTAL_SYNC_LOGS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYNC_STATUS) AS TOTAL_SYNC_STATUS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AUDIT_LOG) AS TOTAL_AUDIT_LOGS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REQUEST_LOG) AS TOTAL_REQUEST_LOGS,
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONFIGURACOES) AS TOTAL_CONFIGS
